steps.title: Use a difference
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two samples. The notes provide a clear difference: the natural rubber fiber is 2.2 millimeters thick, while the single-ply NiTi wire is 0.7 millimeters thick.

steps.title: Reject noncontrasts
steps.content: B emphasizes that both samples heated up. C explains torsional heating generally. D only names the study and the samples without comparing them. The answer is A.
